canAct(address,address).notice: Check if caller has authority to act on behalf of the agent.         Used by other contracts to verify governance authority.

initializeAgent(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Initialize governance for an agent.         Creator becomes the first owner.

isActionApproved(address,uint256,uint8).notice: Check if a quorum-requiring action is approved.         Returns true if the proposal exists, is executed, and matches the action class.
